body.filing: To prepare your EPR filing, first add your products and their packaging components to the Registry.
body.registry: Add products to track packaging components and KF codes, or bootstrap the registry from your NAV invoices.

helpModal.body:
The Registry is the foundation of EPR filing. Every sold product and its packaging components must be entered here with KF codes and weights. The system automatically calculates the packaging quantities to be reported based on your NAV invoices and the Registry.

The fastest method is the "Bootstrap from invoices" button, which automatically populates the Registry from the last 3 months of NAV invoices using AI suggestions. Afterwards, review and correct any uncertain rows.

For manual entry, click the "Add product manually" button.
helpModal.title: About the Product-Packaging Registry

onboarding.title: The Product-Packaging Registry is empty

helpText.firstPlacer: Your company is the first placer on the Hungarian market — this product is EPR-filing liable.
helpText.reseller: Your company resells from another EU producer — this product is NOT filed.
helpText.unknown: Not yet classified — currently included in filings as a compliance-safe default.
